sentences.arabic: أَظُنُّ أَنَّ الْهُوَايَةَ تُضِيفُ مَتْعَةً إِلَى الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Mislim da hobi dodaje užitak životu.
sentences.translationEn: I think that a hobby adds enjoyment to life.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ شَخْصٍ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى شَيْءٍ يُحِبُّهُ بَعِيدًا عَنِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Svakoj osobi treba nešto što voli, van posla.
sentences.translationEn: Every person needs something they love away from work.

sentences.arabic: هِوَايَتِي الرَّسْمُ وَأَجِدُ فِيهِ رَاحَةً كَبِيرَةً.
sentences.translation: Moj hobi je crtanje i u njemu nalazim veliku smirenost.
sentences.translationEn: My hobby is drawing and I find great peace in it.

sentences.arabic: أَنْصَحُكَ أَنْ تَجِدَ هِوَايَةً تُحِبُّهَا وَتَمَارِسَهَا.
sentences.translation: Savjetujem ti da pronađeš hobi koji voliš i da ga se pridržavaš.
sentences.translationEn: I advise you to find a hobby you love and practise it.
